name: ai-mock-interview-platform
description: An AI-powered mock interview platform with dynamic feedback. Built using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL (Drizzle ORM).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "SERVER,CLIENT" -c "green,blue" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client

author: Shirsendu Mali
